name: Linkous Park
description: Linkous Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Welch, WV. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: MacD Pickleball Club
description: MacD Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Welch, WV. There is 1 indoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A membership is required to play.
